title: Configure Email Delivery
description: Set up email notifications for squid run completions

content.introduction: Configure email delivery to receive notifications when your squid runs complete. You can choose to receive immediate notifications or attach results for later use.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: The email address to receive notifications

parameters.name: notifications
parameters.description: Set to true to send email immediately upon completion, or false to attach it for later use

fields.description: ISO timestamp when notifications were activated

parameters.name: squid
parameters.description: The unique identifier (hash) of the squid for which to configure email delivery

proTips.content: Set notifications to false if you want to manage email delivery manually rather than receiving automatic notifications.
The notifications_activation_date is automatically set when you enable notifications for the first time.
Make sure the email address is valid and can receive emails. Invalid addresses will cause delivery failures.
Use the Test Email endpoint to verify your email configuration before activating notifications.

seo.title: Configure Email Delivery - lobstr.io API Documentation
seo.description: Learn how to set up email notifications for squid run completions using the lobstr.io API. Configure email addresses and notification preferences.
